query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as contacts_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dialogs) as dialogs_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) as messages_count, (SELECT id FROM telegram_accounts WHERE telegramId = '7480546401' LIMIT 1) as account_id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LPssBLFuVbNm9U.root --database bdpiDWPftxaP5joCkvKLNw --execute SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as contacts_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dialogs) as dialogs_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) as messages_count, (SELECT id FROM telegram_accounts WHERE telegramId = '7480546401' LIMIT 1) as account_id;
